title: <b>LavaGang Was Here<b>
body:
Greetings

If you’re reading this, we have good and bad news…

The good news is Monogon has abandoned Fantasy Land in favor of greener pastures.. Leaving LavaGang to dig into their left behind research and resources.

The bad news is you’re well past the point of no return. If you stay here now you will be stuck in a long forgotten back closet of MythOS forever, but if you make it to the Void you’re welcome to come join us!

We’re building something new and expanding upon what's been found. Grab what you can and we’ll see you on the outside!

-LavaGang was here
